description: AgentMail MCP server for programmatic inbox management and email automation.

findings.title: Insecure Secret Handling
findings.description: input parameter "pageToken" appears to accept a secret or credential
findings.recommendation: Avoid accepting raw credentials as input parameters. Use secret managers (e.g. 1Password CLI, AWS Secrets Manager) and ensure credentials are never logged or stored in agent traces.

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Tool requests broad permissions (exec/fs/network). Validate input parameters using Enums where possible, and restrict file system operations to explicit allowed directories.
